1.solution:
Junior=n+8, Senior=n. Combined avg=(49n+164)/(n+4). For integer: (n+4)|32.
‚Üí Divisors of 32 ‚Č• 5: {8,16,32} ‚Üí n‚ąą{4,12,28} ‚Üí totals {16,32,64}.
‚Üí Max‚ąíMin = 64‚ąí16 = 48.
Answer: 48.

2.solution:
11 numbers. x is median (6th in sorted). Sorted without x: 2,4,5,7,9,12,14,18,19,28 (sum=118). For x to be 6th: x ‚ąą [9,12].
‚Üí x=9: avg=127/11=11.54 ‚úď (option A). x=10: avg=128/11=11.63 ‚úď (option B). Both are possible.
Answer: D (More than one).

3.solution:
Students with 0 wrong = 100‚ąíK‚āĀ = 100‚ąí58 = 42 (score 30 each). Students with exactly n wrong = K_n‚ąíK_{n+1}=2 for n=1..29.
‚Üí Total marks = 42√ó30 + 2√óő£_{n=1}^{29}(30‚ąín) = 1260 + 2√ó435 = 2130.
‚Üí Avg = 2130/100 = 21.3.
Answer: 21.3.

5.solution:
6 students, avg A. Heaviest H: (6A‚ąíH)/5=A‚ąí5 ‚Üí H=A+25. Lightest L: (6A‚ąíL)/5=A+5 ‚Üí L=A‚ąí25.
‚Üí 6A‚ąíH‚ąíL=160 ‚Üí 6A‚ąí2A=160 ‚Üí A=40 ‚Üí H=65.
Answer: 65 kg.

7.solution:
40% passed (avg ‚ąą [42,95]), 60% failed (avg ‚ąą [14,36]).
‚Üí Min avg = 0.4√ó42+0.6√ó14 = 25.2 ‚Üí nearest integer ceiling = 26.
‚Üí Max avg = 0.4√ó95+0.6√ó36 = 59.6 ‚Üí nearest integer floor = 59.
Answer: B [26, 59].

8.solution:
Reversing number increases sum by 5√ó3.6=18. Reversal of 10a+b gives change=9(b‚ąía)=18 ‚Üí b‚ąía=2.
‚Üí Multiple of 5 with b‚ąía=2: b=5, a=3 ‚Üí number is 35. Reversed: 53. Increase=18 ‚úď.
Answer: 35.

9.solution:
Avg cost of rice = (6√ó12+11√ó15)/17=237/17 per kg. Let rice=17x kg, add 24 kg adulterant.
‚Üí Cost=237x. Revenue=(237/17)(17x+24)=1.4√ó237x ‚Üí 17x+24=23.8x ‚Üí x=60/17.
‚Üí Revenue=(237/17)√ó(60+24)=237√ó84/17=19908/17‚Čą1171.
Answer: A (‚āĻ1171).

10.solution:
Min sum of k distinct whole numbers = k(k‚ąí1)/2. Need k(k‚ąí1)/2 ‚Č§ 192 ‚Üí k‚Č§20.
‚Üí k=20: use {0,1,...,18,21} (sum=192), plus 10 zeros (repeats). 20 distinct values ‚úď.
‚Üí k=21 impossible: min sum=210>192.
Answer: A (20).
